---
layout: single
sidebar:
  nav: bash_sidebar
title: Bash
toc: true
toc_sticky: true
---


## Introduction

The Bourne Again Shell (BASH) is a coding terminal that is used in accordance with git. 
in our [UNIX](Provide link) guide, we went over how to navigate a file directory and how to 
manipulate files in the terminal. This guide will focus on how we can code in the terminal 
using bash as our example set. For a base introduction to file management, we recommend that you click
on the unix link provided above. 

## Resources
